source_trace.source_file: _DATA - FOURNISSEURS_/Hebei Yuanfeng Import And Export Trading Co., Ltd/SONGWAYPET.json

source_trace.detail: Post-acompte Alibaba, PI, lead time and readiness facts formalized from active follow-up.
2026-04-27 Alibaba payment and signed contract entries.
2026-05-15/16 SongwayPet run cancelled, refund visible, FBA cancelled.
DDP/customs clearance incident and supplier refund narrative.
Shipping rail failed before dispatch; no stock shipped.
SharePoint proofs classified from Google Drive MEOW inbox.

alibaba_order.supplier_order_entity: Hebei Yuanfeng Import And Export Trading Co., Ltd.

order_lines.supplier_product_label: Eco-Friendly Sustainable Catnip Toys Cute Lifelike Interactive for Self-Grooming Teeth-Cleaning Catnip Toy
Wholesale New Customizable Eco-friendly Wood Catnip Balls Modern Pet Interactive Movement Toy for Indoor Use Pet Supplies Molars

cancellation_reason: DDP/customs clearance failure for catnip / plant material
ddp_execution_note: The agreed DDP door-to-door Amazon FBA France rail was invalidated at execution after supplier/forwarder refused customs clearance for catnip / plant material.

post_cancellation_20260516.future_guardrail: No future run with catnip/silvervine/gallfruit/natural plant material without forwarder-confirmed DDP door-to-door Amazon FBA France and no buyer customs clearance.
